name: Code Compliance Intake
description: Building and zoning code compliance assessment for construction and renovation projects. Evaluates a project's compliance posture across applicable building codes, zoning requirements, fire and life safety, and permit status to produce a code compliance profile with gap analysis, risk flags, and recommended professional actions.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Code Compliance Report
types.description: Generated code compliance report from intake session data.
